meaning: n.洞穴,窑洞vi.凹陷,投降vt.挖洞,使凹陷
examples: The guide flashed a light into the cave.
The climbers took cover from the storm in a cave.
Images of deer and hunters decorate the cave walls.
He used this cave as a bed and a small stone well for his water.
Today, many sassi have been restored and transformed into cosy abodes, restaurants and swish cave-hotels.
